_comment: Eco-Nur Recommendation Engine Config. Controls how skin types map to products and how specific answers can override the default mapping. To change a mapping: edit primaryMapping. To add an override rule: add an entry to answerOverrides. No JS changes needed.

primaryMapping._comment: Default product per skin type. Evaluated only after all answerOverrides have been checked.

answerOverrides._comment: If user reports burning/itching on new products AND primary type is Dry → upgrade to Olivelle. Olivelle is fragrance-free and barrier-focused, far safer for sensitive-dry overlap.
answerOverrides.reason: Strong sensitivity signal (burning on new products) combined with dry skin → Olivelle is safer than Dry Skin Bar

answerOverrides._comment: If winter makes skin sensitively irritated AND primary type is Dry → Olivelle. Cold-weather reactivity with dry skin points to a compromised barrier that needs the gentlest possible formula.
answerOverrides.reason: Winter sensitivity + dry skin → Olivelle Bar for barrier protection and itch relief

answerOverrides._comment: If user's self-reported primary concern is acne AND computed type is Normal or Combination → upgrade to Active Defense. Self-report carries high weight and overrides a borderline N/C result.
answerOverrides.reason: Self-reported acne as primary concern overrides balanced/normal recommendation

answerOverrides._comment: If user reports frequent widespread acne (q4) AND computed type is Combination → Active Defense. Frequent acne dominates the combination pattern.
answerOverrides.reason: Frequent acne in combination skin → Active Defense more appropriate than Balanced

_comment_priority: When two skin types score equally, the one listed first in tieBreakingPriority wins. Order: clinical risk first (A, S), then most common types, then N as catch-all.
_comment_threshold: Secondary skin type is shown only if its score is at least 65% of the primary type's score. Prevents showing a secondary type when it's only a weak signal.
_comment_fallback: If primaryMapping has no entry for a computed skin type, fall back to this product ID.

whatsappMessageTemplates._comment: WhatsApp order/inquiry message templates. {{skinTypeName}} and {{productName}} are interpolated at runtime.

standard.bn: হ্যালো Eco-Nur! আমার ত্বক '{{skinTypeName}}'। আমি {{productName}} অর্ডার করতে চাই।
standard.en: Hello Eco-Nur! My skin type is '{{skinTypeName}}'. I'd like to order the {{productName}}.

custom.bn: হ্যালো Eco-Nur! আমার ত্বক '{{skinTypeName}}'। কাস্টম বার সম্পর্কে আরও জানতে চাই।
custom.en: Hello Eco-Nur! My skin type is '{{skinTypeName}}'. I'd like to learn more about the Custom Bar.
